reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para llevar el tanque... No tiene gas está estación, y para estirar las piernas y tiene área de descanso con mesitas para almorzar o cenar ya que tiene luces....

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to fill up your tank... This station doesn't have gas, but it's a place to stretch your legs and has a rest area with tables for lunch or dinner since it has lights....

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
